app.title: Chiptune 8-Bit Player
button.add.title: Add audio files (or right-click anywhere in the app)
button.settings.title: Open settings
button.close.title: Close (Esc)
spotify.login.prompt: Connect your Spotify account to browse your library.
spotify.login.browserOpened: A browser window should open. Authorize Chiptune & Bits, then come back.
spotify.login.pasteCode: If the browser didn't open, paste the code from the URL after authorizing:
transport.prev.title: Previous (shift+←)
transport.play.title: Play (Space)
transport.pause.title: Pause (Space)
transport.stop.title: Stop
transport.next.title: Next (shift+→)
transport.volume.label: VOL
dialog.about.title: ABOUT
dialog.about.name: CHIPTUNE 8-BIT PLAYER
dialog.about.description: An 8-bit themed record-player audio app for local music files. Right-click anywhere to explore.
dialog.shortcuts.title: SHORTCUTS
librespot.warning.title: EXPERIMENTAL FEATURE
librespot.warning.intro: Spotify playback is powered by Librespot, an independent open-source implementation of the Spotify protocol.
librespot.warning.point1: Librespot is NOT developed or endorsed by Spotify.
librespot.warning.point2: This feature uses an unofficial implementation and may stop working if Spotify changes its protocols.
librespot.warning.point3: By continuing, you acknowledge these limitations.
librespot.warning.experimental: This is an experimental feature. Please report any issues on GitHub.
dialog.trackInfo.title: TRACK INFO
settings.title: SETTINGS
settings.close.title: Close settings (Esc)
settings.spotify.clientIdHint: Create an app at developer.spotify.com to get your Client ID.
settings.spotify.showWarningHint: Show the experimental warning dialog again before playing Spotify tracks.
spotify.notConfigured: Spotify is not configured yet. Go to Settings to enter your Client ID.
settings.playback.stopBehaviorHint: PAUSE keeps the playhead where it was. REWIND jumps back to 0.
settings.display.alwaysOnTopHint: Keep the window above all other apps.
